validation_queries.description: Verify that 'UCX Comm' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'UCX Comm' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} WHERE string LIKE '%UCX Comm%';

validation_queries.description: Verify entries have non-zero start times
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with zero start times in table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE start = 0

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'ucx' appears in category at least 100 times in table regions
validation_queries.error_message: 'ucx' category entries are fewer than expected in regions
